name: Chizuru Ichinose
description:
__Height:__ 162 cm (5'4")

Chizuru Ichinose, alternatively known as Chizuru Mizuhara in her "rental girlfriend" persona, is a college student at Nerima University who is majoring in Literature and she currently lives in Room 204 of Royal Hills Nerima, just next to [Kazuya Kinoshita](https://anilist.co/character/128105/Kazuya-Kinoshita).
